# Burger Films Pub & Delivery

Official context and documentation for Burger Films Pub & Delivery in Penha-SC, Brazil.

## Business Details
- **Name**: Burger Films Pub & Delivery
- **Niche**: Cinema/Movie themed craft burger restaurant, pub, and delivery
- **Locations**:
  - **Unidade 1 (Alfredo Brunetti)**: Av. Alfredo Brunetti, 631 – Armação, Penha - SC, CEP 88385-000. Located close to Beto Carrero World. Hours: Monday to Sunday, 18:00 to 23:30.
  - **Unidade 2 (Armação - Eugênio Krause)**: Av. Eugênio Krause, 3045 – Penha - SC. Hours: Thursday to Tuesday (closed on Wednesdays), 18:00 to 23:30.
- **WhatsApp/Telephone**: +55 47 99215-5989
- **Website**: https://www.burgerfilms.com.br
- **Key Offerings**: Cinema themed craft burgers, pizzas, appetizers, desserts, and the famous mini-burger all-you-can-eat experience (rodízio de mini burgers, Sunday to Thursday, except Wednesday).

## Target Keywords for SEO
- "hamburgueria em Penha"
- "hamburgueria Penha SC"
- "hambúrguer artesanal Penha"
- "melhor hamburgueria de Penha"
- "pub em Penha SC"
- "delivery de hambúrguer Penha"
- "hamburgueria perto do Beto Carrero"
